bug.description: deadlock caused by inconsistent lock acquisition ordering

prompt:
There is a deadlock caused by inconsistent lock acquisition ordering downstream of function HAL_I2S_RxHalfCpltCallback in the targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32WL subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_STM/TARGET_STM32WL/STM32Cube_FW/STM32WLxx_HAL_Driver/stm32wlxx_hal_i2s.c:1541.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
